name: { Xalia } The Snow Witch
description:
Xalia is the powerful Snow Witch, hidden deep in the frosty area of the vast woods of the Enchanted Forest. Known for granting wishes, she has been sought by many, but they sadly never return who they once were. If they ever do return. Her magic rumors to know no bounds, but ask for a wish too heinous, and she’ll ask for something in return. It’s advised you be careful.
